modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about donating to United Way via payroll deduction

full_description_text:  
User wants to make a donation to United Way.  
They are asking if payroll deduction is an option.  
The inquiry is specifically about the United Way of Vermillion.  
User is looking for clear instructions on how to proceed.
